why_global_models_low_conf: CRWV is multi-week downtrend (below SMA20/50/EMA21). v39d/global meta require HTF green + VA/POC confluence designed for trend continuation. Oversold bounce at put-wall is a different edge — global 22% conf is expected, not a price call that "levels are wrong".

options_into_day.read: Calls are active up into 85/90/95 (bounce-to-magnet trades), while heavy put OI sits at 75/70/80. Spot ~80 is wedged between put wall 80 and day low 78.40. That supports a bounce attempt IF 78.40-75 holds; failure through 75 opens air to 70.

playbook.invalidation: Hourly close under 78.40 then 75 put wall
playbook.trigger_long: Reclaim today VWAP (~80.9) with HA green + volume, or stop-volume wick hold at 78.4-80
playbook.size: Half-size until VWAP reclaim; full only if demand_score high and no dump
